remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target creature with mana value 2 or less
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Destroy target creature with mana value 2 or less. If this spell's additional cost was paid, you gain 2 life.

params.Description: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may blight 1. (You may put a -1/-1 counter on a creature you control.)
